g.aria-label: X-axis titled '年' for a discrete scale with 45 values: 1981, 1982, 1983, 1984, 1985, ending with 2025
Y-axis titled '変動率' for a linear scale with values from −0.3 to 0.2
Symbol legend titled 'Type' for stroke color with 2 values: CPI_log_ret, FX_log_ret
Title text '為替変動とインフレ率の時系列推移'
g.text: 為替変動とインフレ率の時系列推移
